message:
test(storm): add 18 integration tests for resize storm detection and domain budget partitioning (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Tests cover storm detection thresholds, per-tab throttling, domain budget
partitioning across Local/Ssh/Mux domains, multi-host independent budgets,
combined storm+domain scenarios, invariant preservation under load,
overload admission, and starvation bypass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
